'''âh-j-w''' ('''hajawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallbang|wallbang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallbang|wallbang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| hajawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hajawithi|hajawithi]] || [[word:hajawiji|hajawiji]] || [[word:hajawishi|hajawishi]] || [[word:hajawi|hajawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajawuthuth|hajawuthuth]] || [[word:hajawujuj|hajawujuj]] || [[word:hajawushush|hajawushush]] || [[word:hajaw|hajaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajawuthu|hajawuthu]] || [[word:hajawuju|hajawuju]] || [[word:hajawushu|hajawushu]] || [[word:hajawu|hajawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajawufuth|hajawufuth]] || [[word:hajawufuj|hajawufuj]] || [[word:hajawufush|hajawufush]] || [[word:hajawuf|hajawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hajawethe|hajawethe]] || [[word:hajaweje|hajaweje]] || [[word:hajaweshe|hajaweshe]] || [[word:hajawe|hajawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajawothoth|hajawothoth]] || [[word:hajawojoj|hajawojoj]] || [[word:hajawoshosh|hajawoshosh]] || [[word:hajaw|hajaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajawotho|hajawotho]] || [[word:hajawojo|hajawojo]] || [[word:hajawosho|hajawosho]] || [[word:hajawo|hajawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajawofoth|hajawofoth]] || [[word:hajawofoj|hajawofoj]] || [[word:hajawofosh|hajawofosh]] || [[word:hajawof|hajawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hajawĂŠthĂŠ|hajawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hajawĂŠjĂŠ|hajawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hajawĂŠshĂŠ|hajawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hajawĂŠ|hajawĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajawathath|hajawathath]] || [[word:hajawajaj|hajawajaj]] || [[word:hajawashash|hajawashash]] || [[word:hajaw|hajaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajawatha|hajawatha]] || [[word:hajawaja|hajawaja]] || [[word:hajawasha|hajawasha]] || [[word:hajawa|hajawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajawafath|hajawafath]] || [[word:hajawafaj|hajawafaj]] || [[word:hajawafash|hajawafash]] || [[word:hajawaf|hajawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hajawasha|hajawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohajawasha|gohajawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihajawasha|gokihajawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hajawnĂŒsha|hajawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohajawnknĂŒsha|gohajawnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihajawnĂŒsha|gokihajawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hajawshĂ«sha|hajawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohajawnkshĂ«sha|gohajawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihajawshĂ«sha|gokihajawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hajawrosha|hajawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohajawnkrosha|gohajawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihajawrosha|gokihajawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hajawmusha|hajawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajawnkmusha|gohajawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajawmusha|gokihajawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hajawsherasha|hajawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohajawnksherasha|gohajawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihajawsherasha|gokihajawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hajawngasha|hajawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohajawnkngasha|gohajawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihajawngasha|gokihajawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hajawyasha|hajawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohajawnkyasha|gohajawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihajawyasha|gokihajawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hajawyamasha|hajawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohajawnkyamasha|gohajawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihajawyamasha|gokihajawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hajawnĂŒshĂ«sha|hajawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohajawnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohajawnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihajawnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihajawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hajawnĂŒrosha|hajawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohajawnknĂŒrosha|gohajawnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihajawnĂŒrosha|gokihajawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajawnĂŒmusha|hajawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajawnknĂŒmusha|gohajawnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajawnĂŒmusha|gokihajawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hajawshĂ«nĂŒsha|hajawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohajawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohajawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihajawshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihajawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hajawshĂ«rosha|hajawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohajawnkshĂ«rosha|gohajawnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihajawshĂ«rosha|gokihajawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajawshĂ«musha|hajawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajawnkshĂ«musha|gohajawnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajawshĂ«musha|gokihajawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hajawronĂŒsha|hajawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohajawnkronĂŒsha|gohajawnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihajawronĂŒsha|gokihajawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hajawroshĂ«sha|hajawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohajawnkroshĂ«sha|gohajawnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihajawroshĂ«sha|gokihajawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajawromusha|hajawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajawnkromusha|gohajawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajawromusha|gokihajawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hajawmunĂŒsha|hajawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohajawnkmunĂŒsha|gohajawnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihajawmunĂŒsha|gokihajawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hajawmushĂ«sha|hajawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohajawnkmushĂ«sha|gohajawnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihajawmushĂ«sha|gokihajawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hajawmurosha|hajawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohajawnkmurosha|gohajawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihajawmurosha|gokihajawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hajaw|hajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠw|hĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohajaw|hohajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠjĂŠw|hohĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohajaw|hohohajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠjĂŠw|hohohĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhajaw|nĂŒhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠjĂŠw|nĂŒhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhajaw|nĂŒnĂŒhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠjĂŠw|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhajaw|nĂŻhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠjĂŠw|nĂŻhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhajaw|nĂŻnĂŻhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠjĂŠw|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhajaw|luhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠjĂŠw|luhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhajaw|luluhajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠjĂŠw|luluhĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihajaw|lihajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠjĂŠw|lihĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihajaw|lilihajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠjĂŠw|lilihĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohajaw|kohajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠjĂŠw|kohĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohajaw|kokohajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠjĂŠw|kokohĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehajaw|kehajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠjĂŠw|kehĂŠjĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehajaw|kekehajaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠjĂŠw|kekehĂŠjĂŠw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
